- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Requested app: Vite-based web application for offline safety sheet storage, public search, admin login, PDF uploads, expiration alerts, and user management.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Created a Vite + React + TypeScript project manually in the current folder to avoid interactive scaffolding conflicts with the existing hidden directory.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Implemented public consultation, local authentication, role-based admin panel, PDF upload workflows, IndexedDB persistence, and expiration alerts.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions were required by the project setup information.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Installed dependencies and validated a successful production build with npm run build.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Created and launched a VS Code task for npm run dev -- --host.

- [x] Launch the Project
	Skipped debug launch because the user did not request a debugger session.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md was added and updated with scope, credentials, offline notes, and commands.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
